coreIssue: This growth conversation is likely about whether Toby is ready to operate as a Design Lead with visible decision ownership beyond strong execution.
openingQuestion: What kind of decisions or cross-functional moments would you want to own more visibly if we were defining your next-level Design Lead scope now?
listenFor: whether he names a specific decision, forum, or stakeholder where he held back from taking a visible position
whether he points to a particular partner, leader, or meeting where sponsorship or air cover was missing
if they describe cross-team impact with a concrete example from this quarter rather than only team-level delivery
avoid: do not frame being passed over last cycle as the main explanation before he does
do not turn this into a generic development list without naming lead-level decision authority and cross-functional scope
goodOutcome: You and Toby have agreed one lead-level scope where he will own a visible cross-functional decision, plus the sponsorship you will provide to make that ownership real.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where Toby delivered strongly but did not visibly shape the cross-functional decision, so you can ground the growth contract in a real pattern.
